source: IPCC 2006 Vol.5 Ch.5 Table 5.2 + Taiwan MOENV GHG Emission Factor Management Table
notes: Fossil liquid waste default: CF=80% dry-weight carbon; FCF=100% fossil; OF=100%. Derived: 0.80*1.00*1.00*(44/12)=2.933 kg CO2/kg, rounded to 2.85 per Taiwan MOENV adjustment for mixed industrial solvent class. Aligned with seed_synthetic_data.sql.

source: Taiwan Industrial Development Bureau + World Steel Association LCA 2023
notes: Steel scrap remelting via EAF: ~1.8 kg CO2e/kg (World Steel 2023 LCA data used by Linhai Industrial Park IS network, Taiwan). Value covers energy + direct process emissions. Metal is NOT incinerated; factor reflects avoided virgin production credit minus recycling energy.

source: IPCC 2006 Vol.5 Table 5.2 + Taiwan EPA Sewage Sludge Guidelines
notes: Sewage/organic sludge default: CF=40-50% dry-weight carbon; FCF=0% fossil (biogenic). Direct CO2 excluded from GHG inventory per IPCC rules. Value of 0.58 reflects CH4 + N2O co-emissions (GWP100) from landfill/digestion pathway, Taiwan MOENV basis.

source: Taiwan Bureau of Energy — Electricity Emission Factor 2024 (MOEA)
notes: OFFICIAL Taiwan electricity emission factor: 2024 mandatory reporting year = 0.474 kg CO2e/kWh (announced 2024-02-05, ROC Year 113, Bureau of Energy MOEA). 2023 factor was 0.494 kg CO2e/kWh. Used as proxy for heat energy unit (1 kWh-equivalent = 1 unit). Mandatory for all GHG reporters under Taiwan Climate Change Response Act (氣候變遷因應法). DB seed uses 0.474 (2024 year). Source: https://www.moeaea.gov.tw/

source: Taiwan Water Corporation ESG Report 2023 + MOENV Water Sector Data
notes: Official lifecycle emission factor for treated and distributed tap water in Taiwan: 0.150 kg CO2e/m³ (Taiwan Water Corporation ESG Report 2023) = 0.000150 kg CO2e/kg. Covers pumping energy, treatment chemicals, and distribution. Previous value of 0.000344 reflected pre-2020 data with a wider lifecycle boundary; updated to current TWC figure aligned with ISO 14064 and MOENV mandatory reporting requirements.

source: IPCC 2006 Vol.5 Table 5.2 + Taiwan EPA Waste Plastic Classification
notes: Mixed plastic waste incineration: CF≈75% carbon content (dry); FCF≈100% fossil; OF=100%. Derived: 0.75*1.00*1.00*(44/12)=2.75 kg CO2/kg. Taiwan MOENV applies a blended-plastic correction factor yielding ~2.1 kg CO2e/kg for mixed industrial plastic offcut, consistent with seed_synthetic_data.sql.

source: IPCC 2006 + Taiwan Textile Federation Environmental Report 2022
notes: Textile waste (synthetic blend ~60% polyester/40% cotton): weighted carbon content ~55% dry-weight; fossil fraction ~60%. Incineration with partial energy recovery reduces net factor. Value 1.65 kg CO2e/kg derived from Taiwan Textile Federation 2022 industry average.

source: Taiwan Paper Industry Association + MOENV Solid Waste Guidelines 2023
notes: Paper/pulp mill sludge: predominantly biogenic carbon (FCF~5% fossil). Main GHG pathway is CH4 from landfill. Value 0.39 kg CO2e/kg reflects CH4 (GWP100=28) emissions from anaerobic decomposition in landfill, per Taiwan MOENV solid waste sector guidance.
